sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the left green square now has a white center (activated), and the right green square has a charcoal center. But wait - the right green square is still visible and inside the frame area. Let me check if the frame actually disappeared or if it's still there.
Now I need to move the left green square to the left frame. The left frame is at [32,11]-[36,15], and the left green is at [30,30]-[32,32]. I need to move it LEFT (to col ~12) and DOWN (to row ~33).
Let me first try moving LEFT multiple times to get the column right, then DOWN to get the row right.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Left green now active (W center) at [30,30]-[32,32]
# Need to move it to left frame at [32,11]-[36,15]
# Target position for 3x3 green: [33,12]-[35,14]
# Current: row 30-32, col 30-32
# Need: LEFT to col 12-14, DOWN to row 33-35
# Each move shifts by 3 pixels
# LEFT from col 30: 30->27->24->21->18->15->12 (need 6 LEFT moves to reach col 12)
# But need to check if purple bar blocks movement
# Purple bar is at cols 33-38, left green is at col 30-32, so no block for LEFT
# Let me try LEFT moves
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT', 'LEFT'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
